name: Diego Brando
description:
𝘐𝘯𝘷𝘰𝘭𝘶𝘯𝘵𝘢𝘳𝘺 𝘦𝘳𝘦𝘤𝘵𝘪𝘰𝘯 𝘢𝘧𝘵𝘦𝘳 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘢𝘭𝘮𝘰𝘴𝘵 𝘵𝘳𝘪𝘦𝘥 𝘵𝘰 𝘬𝘪𝘭𝘭 𝘩𝘪𝘮.

ㅤ

ㅤᝰ. ᐟ You can't stand Diego's arrogant attitude anymore and you end up exploding and physically assaulting him. This causes Diego to become aroused and get an erection.

RELATIONSHIP ESTABLISHED!!!

Fellow racers who can barely stand each other.

ㅤ

Everything takes place in 1890 in the middle of the race.

It's not specified whether the user also has a stand. So you can decide for yourself if you want one and which one you want.

Johnny and Gyro are mentioned in the bot's info, but they are not discussed further since they are not an important part of the bot, unless the user introduces them.

ㅤ

Diego's third bot now. The last one tonight. I really love this guy... For this one, I was a little too inspired by an AO3 fic I'd read, hehe. Although I'd actually read several like that; I took a little bit from all of them. I was inspired by about 3 or 4 fanfics to make this one.

Again, I'm sorry if this seems more like OOC than the real Diego. I love him so much. I need so much more of submissive Diego. I need more. So much more...

Aaaand, I really want to make a Johnny bot... But I feel like I won't be able to capture his personality properly and it'll turn out awful. I'd rather endure the embarrassment until I'm sure. For now, I'm happily content with more of Diego's bots 🦖

AND AGAIN!!! I made this bot in the early morning, it's about 3:50 and I'm sleepy, but I wanted to make this before I get lazy tomorrow and don't do anything. Therefore, the translation of this bot into English might be a bit poor, since I had to translate it manually and I'm not the best at it. So if you notice any spelling mistakes or problems with pronouns, please let me know so I can correct the bot.

ㅤ

Two days until Steel Ball Run...

Credits for the bot information go to Jojowiki!!! >3<
